sources.title: NVIDIA Xid Errors
sources.summary: Official NVIDIA guidance for understanding Xid messages, classifying fault families, and interpreting GPU-related error codes during diagnosis.

sources.title: NVIDIA NCCL Troubleshooting
sources.summary: Official NCCL troubleshooting guidance covering error categories, debugging, transport behavior, and reliability and serviceability features for collective communication issues.

sources.title: NVIDIA CUDA Compatibility
sources.summary: Official CUDA compatibility guidance describing backward, minor-version, and forward-compatibility models, including when compatibility packages are required.

sources.title: NVIDIA GPU Operator Troubleshooting
sources.summary: Official GPU Operator troubleshooting guidance for Kubernetes GPU deployments, including pending pods, driver issues, mixed MIG regressions, and operator operand failures.

sources.title: NVIDIA DCGM Overview
sources.summary: Official DCGM documentation describing GPU monitoring, diagnostics, health checks, policy management, and datacenter telemetry responsibilities.

sources.title: NVIDIA GPUDirect Storage Installation and Troubleshooting Guide
sources.summary: Official GPUDirect Storage guidance covering installation checks, direct-path prerequisites, API errors, and performance and troubleshooting steps for storage-to-GPU data paths.

sources.title: NVIDIA Multi-Instance GPU User Guide
sources.summary: Official MIG guidance for supported platforms, partitioning concepts, device-instance layout, and operational considerations when mixing slices with full GPUs.
